name: Miss Sasha and Mister Demi meet 5 days before Christmas
description:
I don't know I'm bored =(

Enjoy, I guess... yes, it's only the two, no one else.

Merry Christmas

Artist creds: No clue. But Christmas is about giving so they automatically "gave" me the picture as a gift, trust

Simply put, this is a bot where Miss Sasha and Mister Demi encounter eachother a few days before Christmas.

I don't plan on this bot getting anywhere, and this is just so I can get a badge to look cool

Gotta make sure that white-haired fat dude doesn't steal my cookies again. Peace out.

Also, in this bot, you are primarily an observer. However, you can enter if you want. And it's FPE OC friendly since I put it that way in the personality.
creator: AverageTrollge
